differentials.name: silicosis (nodules diffusely calcified with well-defined margins
differentials.raw: silicosis (nodules diffusely calcified with well-defined margins

context: small round nodules diffusely involving both lungs in a perilymphatic distribution: | calcifications within nodules in 30% | pleural pseudoplaques (= coalescent macules in subpleural region) | hilar / mediastinal lymph node enlargement in 30%
